rationale: Duplicate Q-ID resolution (post v6.73 Round 3): entity 859 Tsalagi (Latin) e entity 218 ᏣᎳᎩ (Cherokee script) puntano entrambi a Q105405 Cherokee. Primary = 218 (id minore, script nativo).
Duplicate Q-ID resolution: entity 532 Taino (ASCII) e entity 513 Taíno (accentato) puntano a Q210623. Primary = 513 (id minore).
Duplicate Q-ID resolution: entity 726 Muscogee (English) e entity 219 Mvskoke (Creek native) puntano a Q51705. Primary = 219 (id minore, nome nativo).
